backend/main.mo: Motoko actor providing score storage with query function to retrieve scores by ID and shared function to append new scores to an array.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed features: traffic road background replacement, traffic-themed obstacles (cars and traffic cones), and updated obstacle spawning logic.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing the Shinchan Runner game components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the Shinchan-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Shinchan Runner application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the React Three Fiber Canvas with orthographic camera, gradient background, Game component, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/Background.tsx: Infinite scrolling traffic road background using two textured planes that reposition seamlessly for continuous parallax effect based on game speed.
frontend/src/components/Collectible.tsx: Chocobi chip collectible with floating animation, rotation, horizontal scrolling movement, and callback when moving off-screen.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game orchestrator managing game states (start/playing/gameOver), score tracking, spawning collectibles and traffic obstacles, collision detection, and progressive difficulty scaling.
frontend/src/components/GameOver.tsx: Game over screen overlay displaying final score with encouraging messages and a restart button styled with Shinchan theme colors.
frontend/src/components/Obstacle.tsx: Traffic obstacle component supporting car and traffic cone types with appropriate textures, sizes, scrolling behavior, and off-screen cleanup.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: Shinchan player character with jump physics, gravity simulation, ground and ceiling collision detection, and textured sprite rendering.
frontend/src/components/ScoreDisplay.tsx: HUD component displaying current score in a styled badge positioned at the top center during gameplay.
frontend/src/components/StartScreen.tsx: React component that renders a full-screen start menu with game instructions (collect chips, avoid obstacles, controls) and a start button. Includes branding footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, automatically recreating the actor when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useCollectibles.ts: React hook that manages collectible items state with functions to spawn collectibles at random heights, remove specific collectibles by ID, and clear all collectibles.
frontend/src/hooks/useControls.ts: React hook that handles game controls (jump, moveUp, moveDown) via keyboard (Space/ArrowUp) and mouse click events, with enable/disable toggle.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useObstacles.ts: React hook that manages obstacle state (cars and traffic cones) with functions to spawn obstacles at random positions, remove specific obstacles, and clear all obstacles.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook that fetches a score from the backend actor by ID, enabled only when actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for Shinchan theme colors (red, yellow, orange, blue), and utility classes for applying theme colors to text, backgrounds, and borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/utils/collision.ts: Utility function that checks circular collision between player and target objects based on their positions and sizes using distance calculation.
frontend/src/utils/difficulty.ts: Utility function that calculates game speed based on score, progressively increasing speed every 50 points up to a maximum of 3x base speed.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for Shinchan colors, OKLCH color system, custom fonts (Fredoka, Bangers), and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project state file defining a Shinchan endless runner game with traffic road theme, tracking 10 implemented features including side-scrolling mechanics, collectibles, obstacles, dual control system, and score tracking. Contains architectural notes, image requirements for traffic-themed assets, and feature versioning with requirement IDs.
